name: Ceremony
description: Dual 18dB resonant twin-peak filter inspired by Rob Hordijk. Morphs from lowpass to bandpass, crossfades two inputs, self-oscillates when driven, and adds FM, feedback and output VCA control.

controls.name: Freq A
controls.description: Sets the first resonant peak frequency.

controls.name: Freq B
controls.description: Sets the second resonant peak frequency.

controls.name: Both
controls.description: Moves both peaks together and tracks 1V/oct when patched.

controls.name: LP/BP
controls.description: Morphs the response from lowpass toward twin-peak bandpass.

controls.name: Resonance
controls.description: Raises resonance until the filter self-oscillates and pings cleanly.

controls.name: Feed A
controls.description: Routes input back into frequency control for richer harmonics.

controls.name: Feed B
controls.description: Routes input back into the second frequency control.

controls.name: FM Mod
controls.description: Sets how much Frequency B modulates Frequency A.

inputs.name: Audio In A
inputs.description: First audio input path for the crossfader stage.

inputs.name: Audio In B
inputs.description: Second audio input path for the crossfader stage.

inputs.name: Freq A CV
inputs.description: Attenuverted frequency CV for filter A.

inputs.name: Freq B CV
inputs.description: Attenuverted frequency CV for filter B.

inputs.name: Both CV
inputs.description: Tracks 1V/oct and moves both frequencies equally.

inputs.name: FM CV
inputs.description: Controls the amount of frequency modulation between the two peaks.

inputs.name: VCA CV
inputs.description: Controls the output VCA on the main output.

outputs.name: OUT
outputs.description: Main filtered output with voltage-controlled VCA.

behaviors.name: Twin-peak morph
behaviors.description: The response continuously moves from lowpass to twin-peak bandpass without switching modes.

behaviors.name: Frequency linking
behaviors.description: The Both input tracks 1V/oct and moves both resonant peaks together.

behaviors.name: Frequency FM
behaviors.description: Frequency B can modulate Frequency A for evolving harmonic motion.

behaviors.name: Feedback coloration
behaviors.description: Routing the input back into the frequency controls adds harmonics and makes simple signals ring.

behaviors.name: Self-oscillation pings
behaviors.description: At higher resonance settings the filter self-oscillates and can be pinged for plucks and bell tones.

behaviors.name: Output dynamics
behaviors.description: The main output VCA lets the module shape its own level instead of forcing an external VCA.

patchIdeas.name: Twin-peak bell
patchIdeas.patch: Raise resonance until the module pings · drive Both with a sequencer pitch line · use the twin-peak response as a bell-like resonator with two tunable partials.
patchIdeas.diagram:
Ceremony:
* LP/BP: noon
* Resonance: high
* FM Mod: low

Sequencer:
Output:

- Sequencer (Pitch) p> Ceremony (Both CV)
- Sequencer (Gate) g> Ceremony (Audio In A)
- Ceremony (OUT) -> Output (In)

patchIdeas.name: Crossfaded stereo filter
patchIdeas.patch: Run two audio sources into the crossfader inputs · sweep LP/BP and the input blend together · the output keeps the sources glued into one moving resonant image.
patchIdeas.diagram:
Ceremony:
* LP/BP: lowpass
* Resonance: medium
* Feed A: low
* Feed B: low

VCO A:
VCO B:
Output:

- VCO A (Out) -> Ceremony (Audio In A)
- VCO B (Out) -> Ceremony (Audio In B)
- Ceremony (OUT) -> Output (In)

patchIdeas.name: Self-oscillating drone
patchIdeas.patch: Use high resonance and low feed values · patch Both from a slow CV source · the module becomes a pitched dual-peak drone with a narrow center and ringing shoulders.
patchIdeas.diagram:
Ceremony:
* LP/BP: 3 o'clock
* Resonance: max
* FM Mod: slow

LFO:
Output:

- LFO (Out) >> Ceremony (Both CV)
- Ceremony (OUT) -> Output (In)

patchIdeas.name: Feedback acid line
patchIdeas.patch: Send a saw wave into Audio In A · raise Feed A and FM Mod · the input feeds back into the frequency network and the filter moves from clean to vocal to gritty in one gesture.
patchIdeas.diagram:
Ceremony:
* LP/BP: 2 o'clock
* Feed A: high
* FM Mod: medium

VCO:
Output:

- VCO (Saw) -> Ceremony (Audio In A)
- Ceremony (OUT) -> Output (In)
